icecream.title: 🍦 Let's Make Ice Cream!
icecream.html:
Do you like ice cream? It is easy to make at home! You need cream, sugar, salt and plastic bags.

First, pour the cream into a small plastic bag. Add some sugar. Close the bag very well.

Next, put ice and salt in a big plastic bag. Put the small bag inside the big bag. Close it.

Now shake the bags for ten minutes! The salt makes the ice very, very cold. The cold ice freezes the cream.

Open the small bag. Your mixture is now ice cream! You can add fruit on top. Was it easy? Yes, it was!

mixtures.title: 🥗 Creating Mixtures
mixtures.html:
A mixture is when you put two or more things together. We make mixtures every day!

When you make a salad, you mix vegetables together. Lettuce, tomatoes and carrots make a healthy salad.

When you make pasta, you boil water and add the pasta. Then you can add sauce. That is a mixture too!

When you make tea or coffee, you add hot water. If you add sugar and milk, you are making a mixture.

Some mixtures can be separated. You can pick the fruit out of a fruit salad. But some mixtures cannot be separated easily. When you mix sugar in water, you cannot take the sugar out!

The teacher asked: 'Was the experiment fun?' The children said: 'Yes! It was great!' 'Were the results good?' 'Yes, they were!'
